content.en:
Dark Forbidden Realm.

Ye Tian began to cultivate the Black Yuan Holy Body, and soon after, the Black Yuan Holy Body was cultivated.

As soon as the Black Yuan Holy Body became one, Ye Tian's physical body became even stronger.

However, the Black Yuan Holy Body and the Mixed Yuan Holy Body did not cause a metamorphosis, and it was obvious that there was no way to transform into an eternal immortal holy body without the lack of the Forbidden Heaven Holy Body.

So, Ye Tian continued to copy his body, and let the copied body begin to cultivate the Forbidden Heaven Holy Body.

In this way, tens of thousands of years have passed, and Ye Tiancai has cultivated the Forbidden Heaven Holy Body, which is completely the same as the previous cultivation routine.

this day.

After Ye Tian ensured that he could 100% cultivate the Forbidden Heaven Holy Body, the main body came to the Dark Forbidden Domain and cultivated the Forbidden Heaven Holy Body.

It didn't take long for the Forbidden Heaven Holy Body to be cultivated.

And just after the cultivation of the Forbidden Heaven Holy Body, the three holy bodies all urged independently, and then began to merge.

Eucharistic Metamorphosis !!!

Rumble!!!!!

Countless dark forbidden powers poured into Ye Tian's body from the dark forbidden domain, acting as the energy of his transformation.

However, the power of the surrounding dark taboo was not enough, and there was no way to satisfy Ye Tian's transformation.

As a result, Ye Tian took out some of the many resources he had obtained from the Battle Gate, crushed them one after another and turned them into pure energy, which was absorbed by the Holy Body.

Time passed little by little, and Ye Tian's transformation continued.

Decade!

Century!

Millennium!

It wasn't until the 3000th year that Ye Tian's transformation was finally completed.

this day.

Ye Tian opened his eyes, his body exuded an eternal and immortal aura, and when he walked into the dark forbidden realm, a wisp of aura seemed to crush the eons.

Now he is too powerful!

Eternal and above all.

He had already cultivated the Eternal Immortal Holy Body, and once he activated this Holy Body, his strength would be greatly enhanced.

Moreover, his current Eternal Immortal Holy Body was only equivalent to the entry realm, because the other two Holy Bodies were too low in level, resulting in the Eternal Immortal Holy Body after fusion only being at the entry level.

But even if it was only an entry level, the Eternal Immortal Holy Body could also beat the Mixed Yuan Holy Body of the Great Adult level, not to mention other Holy Bodies.

This is the power of the First Holy Body of the Dark Sanctuary!

Of course, it is naturally very difficult for such a holy body to be promoted, but the battle gate promises to raise his holy body to the Dacheng realm, and he does not need to spend any resources on the holy body.

"My current combat power is absolutely stable and has entered the Sevenfold Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor combat power, once I exert the power of the Extreme Dao, I am afraid that I will be able to directly compete with the Eightfold Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor combat power!

Ye Tian muttered.

this day.

Ye Tian entered the Battle Realm Tower again, contacted the high-level leaders of the Battle Gate through the Battle Gate's Battle Hall, and announced that he had cultivated the Eternal Immortal Holy Body.

Soon this news was learned by the high-level leaders of the Battle Gate, and for the first time, the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor came to the Battle Realm Tower again.

-------------

Warfield.

The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor descended and found Ye Tian.

"Ten Thousand Dharma Dao Ancestors, have you really cultivated the Eternal Immortal Holy Body?"

The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor was a little incredulous.

Although he thought that Ye Tian might be able to cultivate the Eternal Immortal Holy Body by a line, how long had it been?

I have just obtained the Black Yuan Holy Body Inheritance and the Forbidden Heaven Holy Body Inheritance, shouldn't I carefully comprehend countless years, and then try to cultivate after I am sure enough?

Cultivating so quickly, that's too dangerous!

But he never expected that in less than 100,000 years, Ye Tian announced that he had cultivated the Eternal Immortal Holy Body, how could he not be shocked?

"Blood Gang Domain Ancestor, I have really cultivated the Eternal Immortal Holy Body!"

As he spoke, Ye Tian showed the Eternal Immortal Holy Body.

Rumble!!!!

The breath of the Eternal Immortal Eucharist burst out, and the powerful Eucharist was too strong.

Although this coercion was nothing to the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor, he could see that this was indeed an Eternal Immortal Holy Body!

"I didn't expect you to really practice!"

The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor was shocked.

"Blood Gang Domain Ancestor, the Battle Gate promised to provide me with the resources to cultivate the Holy Body to the Dacheng realm, I shouldn't regret it, right?"

Ye Tian asked.

After all, the Mixed Yuan Holy Body Great Achievement and the Eternal Immortal Holy Body Great Body, the difference in resources required between the two is more than ten times, or even a hundred times!

"Naturally, no problem!"

The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor said with a smile.

Not to mention letting Ye Tian cultivate the Eternal Immortal Holy Body to the Dacheng realm, even if Ye Tian cultivated the Eternal Immortal Holy Body to the consummation realm, the Battle Gate could easily afford it.

The foundation of the battle gate is far beyond Ye Tian's imagination, and it is naturally not short of such a little resource.

"Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor, you remember, the Eternal Immortal Holy Body is easy not to cast, especially in the Battle Realm Tower, once you cast the Eternal Immortal Holy Body, I am worried that someone will be unfavorable to you. You must know that there is a competition between the Ten Holy Gates and even many Holy Bodies, and I don't know how many Holy Sons have fallen without a trace, and it is even difficult to investigate who killed them. Falling in the dark forbidden realm, there are many times when there is no way to deduce it, so be careful!"

The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor reminded.

"I understand!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Suddenly, Ye Tian said again: "Blood Gang Domain Ancestor, I want to know if the Battle Gate has a holy technique inheritance?"

"Holy Technique, what, you want to cultivate Holy Technique?" said the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor in surprise.

"Yes, I'm very interested in holy techniques and want to cultivate a holy technique!"

Ye Tian said.

"The inheritance of holy techniques is very precious, and the difficulty of cultivation is beyond your imagination, even if the Supreme Domain Ancestor has cultivated for a long time, he may not be able to successfully cultivate a holy technique. In the Dark Sanctuary, there is almost no way for the creatures below the ancestor of the Supreme Domain to cultivate the Holy Technique, unless it is a demon with the Holy Endowment. But the demons who possess the Holy Endowment are almost all the descendants of those Supreme Domain Ancestors, so naturally there is no shortage of Holy Skills!" the Blood Gang Domain Ancestor said.

"Blood Gang Domain Ancestor, even so, I still want to give it a try, I don't know how to qualify for a holy skill inheritance?"

Ye Tian insisted.

"This ......" The Blood Gang Domain Ancestor hesitated for a moment, and then said, "If anyone else, even a top Domain Ancestor, asks for the inheritance of the Holy Technique, I will directly refuse." But after all, you have an eternal immortal holy body, I can report your request, as for whether the battle gate will agree to teach you the holy technique, I dare not guarantee, after all, I am only one of the high-level, and I can't represent all the high-level!"

"Then thank you Blood Gang Domain Ancestor!"

Ye Tian said gratefully.
